response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and a strong entrepreneurial background, his profile aligns more closely with a Senior or Staff Full-Stack Engineer rather than a Director-level Principal AI Strategist. His exposure to AI is limited to his most recent role, lacking the deep, recognized industry expertise, advanced AI education, and strategic customer-advising experience required for this senior leadership position.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software and infrastructure engineering experience across various tech stacks.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive and technical leadership as the founder of GISCollective.
Strong background in developer tooling, DevOps (Kubernetes, AWS CDK), and modern SWE practices.
concerns: Lacks Director-level strategic leadership and experience advising enterprise customers on AI adoption.
AI experience appears limited to his most recent role, missing the preferred recognized industry expertise.
Does not possess an advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
